workflow_steps.instruction_clarification: Activate the Nanjiang regional power-system model and use the current operating scenario as the initial state for the N-1 assessment.
workflow_steps.expected_output: The target model and operating scenario are active before contingency execution.

feedback_information.message: The model-activation requirement is clear if the prepared 201-bus model and the intended operating scenario are already available.

workflow_steps.instruction_clarification: Clarify whether the N-1 assessment should be global or limited to selected transmission lines.
workflow_steps.expected_output: The contingency scope is confirmed before executing the N-1 workflow.

feedback_information.message: The original intent specifies an N-1 assessment but does not explicitly state whether the scope is global or partial. Engineer confirmation is required before execution.
unclear_items: Whether the N-1 assessment should cover all available transmission lines or only a specified subset.
Whether any out-of-service or special-operation branches should be excluded from the contingency set.
feedback_information.engineer_response_record: The engineer confirms global branch-outage N-1 assessment over the available transmission-line set.

workflow_steps.instruction_clarification: Generate the branch-outage contingency set according to the confirmed global N-1 scope.
workflow_steps.expected_output: A sequential contingency list is prepared for branch-outage N-1 assessment.

feedback_information.message: The contingency-set generation step is clear after the engineer confirms the global branch-outage scope.

workflow_steps.instruction_clarification: Execute the N-1 assessment sequentially for each line in the confirmed branch-outage contingency set. For each line, apply the outage, run the security assessment or power-flow calculation, record the result, and restore the network state before moving to the next line.
workflow_steps.expected_output: N-1 assessment results are recorded for all selected branch-outage contingencies.

expanded_contingency_steps_example.assessment_action: execute N-1 assessment for the current outage
expanded_contingency_steps_example.post_action: restore Line_001 before the next contingency

expanded_contingency_steps_example.assessment_action: execute N-1 assessment for the current outage
expanded_contingency_steps_example.post_action: restore Line_002 before the next contingency

expanded_contingency_steps_example.outage_action: repeat the same outage-assessment-restoration pattern for the remaining selected lines
expanded_contingency_steps_example.assessment_action: execute N-1 assessment for each remaining line outage
expanded_contingency_steps_example.post_action: restore each target line before continuing

expanded_contingency_steps_example.assessment_action: execute N-1 assessment for the current outage
expanded_contingency_steps_example.post_action: restore Line_097 after the final contingency

feedback_information.message: The repeated N-1 execution pattern is clear after the contingency set is confirmed. The workflow explicitly restores the original network state after each outage to avoid state contamination between contingencies.

workflow_steps.instruction_clarification: Retrieve the N-1 assessment report after all selected branch-outage contingencies have been evaluated.
workflow_steps.expected_output: The N-1 report is retrieved for result summarization and engineering review.

feedback_information.message: The report-retrieval step is clear. The report should summarize the solver status and violation information for the evaluated contingencies.

workflow_steps.instruction_clarification: Summarize the N-1 results into an engineer-oriented report, including contingency status, violation flags, and representative loading or overload information.
workflow_steps.expected_output: A summarized N-1 result record is prepared for engineer review.

feedback_information.message: The result-summary step is clear. Detailed engineering interpretation remains the responsibility of the engineer.
